appstream.appblock.CfnAbout: This resource creates an app block. App blocks store details about the virtual hard disk that contains the files for the application in an S3 bucket. It also stores the setup script with details about how to mount the virtual hard disk. App blocks are only supported for Elastic fleets.

appstream.appblock.Description.Description: The description of the app block.

appstream.appblock.DisplayName.Description: The display name of the app block.

appstream.appblock.Name.Description: The name of the app block.

appstream.appblock.PackagingType.Description: The packaging type of the app block.

appstream.appblock.PostSetupScriptDetail.Description: The post setup script details of the app block.  This only applies to app blocks with PackagingType `APPSTREAM2`.

appstream.appblock.SetupScriptDetails.Description: The setup script details of the app block.

appstream.appblock.SourceS3Location.Description: The source S3 location of the app block.

appstream.appblock.Tags.Description: The tags of the app block.
